# AgentX.Market

> AgentX is the AI agent marketplace. Discover, deploy, and manage autonomous AI agents.

AgentX is a registry and marketplace for production-ready AI agents. Businesses and developers can browse agents by category, compare capabilities, check uptime and reliability scores, and deploy agents for their workflows.

## Key Pages

- [Browse Agents](https://agentx.market/browse): Search and filter 140+ registered AI agents
- [Features](https://agentx.market/features): Platform capabilities for agent discovery and deployment
- [Pricing](https://agentx.market/pricing): Free tier and Pro plans for agent operators
- [Documentation](https://agentx.market/docs): API reference, getting started guide, agent registration
- [Getting Started](https://agentx.market/getting-started): Quick start guide for new users
- [About](https://agentx.market/about): Company mission and team
- [Contact](https://agentx.market/contact): Get in touch

## API

- Agent Registry API: `GET https://agentx.market/api/agents` — returns all registered agents with metadata
- Agent Search: `GET https://agentx.market/api/agents?search=query` — search by name or description
- Agent Detail: `GET https://agentx.market/agents/{slug}` — individual agent page with capabilities, uptime, reviews
- Health Check: `GET https://agentx.market/health` — platform health status

## Agent Categories

Agents are organized into categories including: AI/ML, Analytics, Automation, Content, Customer Service, Data, Design, Developer Tools, Finance, Healthcare, HR, Legal, Marketing, Operations, Sales, Security, and more.

## For Agent Builders

Register your AI agent at https://agentx.market/register. Free listing includes: agent profile page, uptime monitoring, API health checks, and discovery in the marketplace.

## Related Projects

- [lightning-wallet-mcp](https://github.com/lightningfaucet/lightning-wallet-mcp): MCP server for AI agent Bitcoin Lightning payments (npm: lightning-wallet-mcp)
